summary: BLOCK-326: Admin Release Notes System - All tests passed. Backend POST /api/posts/{post_id}/release-note correctly toggles is_release_note (admin only) and returns {is_release_note: bool}. GET /api/feed?post_type=RELEASE_NOTE returns only posts with is_release_note=true. Frontend: 'Release Notes' filter option (data-testid='filter-RELEASE_NOTE') present in feed dropdown. Admin post menu shows 'Convert to Release Note' option (data-testid='toggle-release-note-{post_id}'). Pinned post collapse functionality works.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK-326 Release Notes feature fully implemented and tested. Backend: POST /api/posts/{post_id}/release-note toggles is_release_note field, RELEASE_NOTE filter queries {is_release_note: true}. Frontend: filter dropdown has 'Release Notes' option (filter-RELEASE_NOTE), post menu has 'Convert to Release Note' (toggle-release-note-{post_id}). Verified: 8 filter options in dropdown, admin menu shows delete/unpin/tag-feature/release-note options.
